logs

saw this on one of those nindies? (nintendo indies ?) direct and it was an instant buy. relaxing puzzle game about organizing with a cat???? HELL YEAH

i also find it cool how you can complete the levels in different ways. like for example you in this screenshot you could organize the crystals following the gradient or by the amount of lines they have

screenshots

if you are adding me to any of these, please send me a message or an e-mail to me know who you are! i don't accept requests from people i don't know :p
